_doc: Manually-verified Arabic → English aliases for RERA project register fields. Only mappings with >90% confidence are included; lower-confidence ones go to _skipped with a note so the next pass knows why. Source: cross-referencing developer name + their dominant master_project_en + DLD's public registry on https://dubailand.gov.ae and Crunchbase/company profiles.

Dubai Healthcare City Free Zone LLC
developers.شركة تطوير مجمع دبي للاستثمار (ذ. م. م): Dubai Investments Park Development Co LLC
developers.ماجد الفطيم لتشغيل مشاريع المدن المتكامل: Majid Al Futtaim Integrated Cities LLC
developers.الياس و مصطفى كلداري لإدارة الاستثمار و: Ilyas & Mustafa Galadari Investment & Development LLC

_skipped: دى اتش ايه ام منطقه حره - ذ.م.م — couldn't confirm full English entity name ('DHAM Free Zone LLC'?), skipping

شركة الخط الامامي لادارة الاستثمار ش.ذ.م.م — produces only DAMAC HILLS 2; literal translation = 'Front Line Investment Management Co LLC' but couldn't verify as their official English name. Probably a DAMAC sub-entity.
واحة الجزيرة العقارية (ش.ذ.م.م) — literal = 'Island Oasis Properties LLC' but couldn't confirm official spelling; produces DAMAC Lagoons
داماك ميري للاستثمار ش.ذ.م.م — DAMAC sub-entity ('Marie'? 'Miri'?); skipping till verified
دبي بينينسولا ش.ذ.م.م — 'Dubai Peninsula' is the literal name but corp identity unclear
individual / small developers (≤5 projects each) — too many to verify confidently; left in original Arabic
